first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is substantively the same. Both evaluations correctly identify the same core skill gap: the candidate's experience is in web technologies and DLang, while the role requires deep C++ and low-level systems experience. The minor differences in phrasing are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and show no connection to the change in location from Berlin to São Paulo.
